title.en: If she were on her own, it would take an endles...

content.en:
In fact, Su Ya was able to scrape together 100 million Eternal Gold Coins, but she didn't rely on herself.

If she were on her own, it would take an endless long time to get it together.

She relied on her father Su Xu.

Su Xu successfully broke through to the Legendary Dao Realm, obtained a large number of rewards from the Sioux Clan, and could mobilize some funds.

After that, Su Xu gave her some of the Eternal Gold Coins he had accumulated before, and then used his authority to let Su Ya apply for a loan, which could be repaid slowly in the future.

In this way, Su Ya was able to gather 100 million eternal gold coins.

Subsequently.

Su Ya exchanged a drop of agar jelly to Dao gold liquid, and this drop of agar jelly to Dao gold liquid will be personally sent to the Su people by a legend to the Dao realm.

And she also consumed 100 million Eternity Solstice Gold Coins.

"Ye Domain Lord, I've already done a good job!"

Suya took her leave.

After Su Ya left, Ye Tian also began to plan the elixir to the Dao gold liquid.

First, he had to scrape together 100,000,000,000 Eternity Gold Coins.

However, the Eternal Solstice Gold Coin on his body now is only more than two million, but his wealth is all kinds of materials that can be exchanged for Eternal Solstice Gold Coins.

So, in the following years, he sold all kinds of resources everywhere, obtained a large number of eternal gold coins from one force after another, and also sold some fifth-order supreme rule items and sixth-sequence supreme dao rule comprehension.

In a short period of time, he had amassed a large number of Eternity Gold Coins.

10,000,000 Eternal Coins!

20,000,000 Eternity to Gold Coins!

30,000,000 Eternal Gold Coins!

The Lost Domain provided Ye Tian with a large number of resources and treasures, and finally allowed Ye Tian to gather 100 million Eternal Gold Coins.

Moreover, many of his incomparably precious resources were not sold, and what he sold were some relatively general resources, which were useful for the Sevenfold Dao Realm and the Eightfold Dao Realm, and the amount was huge, which could be exchanged for hundreds of millions of Eternal Gold Coins.

"Hahaha, it's not difficult to get together 100 million eternal gold coins!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But others did not dare to accumulate wealth like him, or they would surely die.

......

The Temple of the Most High.

Ye Tian applied to exchange 100 million Eternal Solstice Gold Coin for a drop of Agar Essence Dao Gold Liquid, and after the application was approved, his 100 million Eternal Solstice Gold Coin was deducted.

After that, he just had to wait for the elixir to reach his hands.

this day.

A statue that is said to have descended to the Dao realm in Ye Tian's mansion in the fortress on a winter night.

"Deacon Ye, your belongings have been delivered. "

This legendary Dao realm is shrouded in special full-body armor, and his appearance is imperceptible, and his identity is very mysterious.

Ye Tian habitually used the copying talent to perceive it, but he didn't perceive the other party's talent.

This is definitely not that the other party is hiding too deeply, he can even sense the talent of the Longyan Ancient Emperor.

This legendary Dao Realm has no talent, which proves that the other party is not a real creature.

"Puppet!"

Ye Tian guessed.

A puppet who is said to be in the Dao realm, how shocking it is when this is spread, the essence of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance is unimaginable to him!

But such a puppet must not be able to be manufactured in batches, otherwise the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will create a large number of legendary Dao realm puppets, and they are still afraid of the Dao Void Demon?

Ye Tian took the item, opened it and looked at it, and made sure that it was the real elixir to Dao gold liquid, so he accepted it.

And this legendary Dao realm puppet left immediately.

......

"A drop of elixir to Dao gold liquid, now that I have it, I want to see if the good things that cost such a big price can make my cultivation skyrocket!"

Ye Tian swallowed it in one gulp and began to refine the elixir to the Dao Gold Liquid.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying energy turned into silk threads and merged into his body, and his body transformed at an incredible speed, and his cultivation soared rapidly.

"It's incredible!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He had never thought that he would have such resources, it was so easy to improve his cultivation!

In the blink of an eye, the ten solstice era years have passed.

Rumble!

His cultivation broke through, from the early stage of the Eightfold to the Dao Realm to the middle stage of the Eightfold Dao Realm.

Subsequently, hundreds of years passed before he absorbed and refined this drop of elixir to Dao gold liquid, and his cultivation also completely broke through to the late stage of the Eightfold Dao Realm.

In such a short period of time, the cultivation level was raised to the late stage of the Eightfold Dao Realm, and the effect of the elixir to the Dao gold liquid was too terrifying.

"If there is another drop of elixir to Dao Golden Liquid, my cultivation will definitely be able to be promoted to the peak realm of the eightfold Dao realm, and then I can impact the ninefold Dao realm!" Ye Tian thought excitedly.

Becoming a Ninefold Dao Realm meant too much to him, he could completely compete with legendary creatures, even if he couldn't win, he wouldn't lose.

At that time, his strength was definitely comparable to that of the Immortal Emperor.

"It is very likely that the Immortal Emperor is the third sequence of Supreme Dao rule items found in the Lost Domain, if my guess is not wrong, there is definitely a third sequence of Supreme Dao rule items in the Lost Domain, I must find them. Ye Tian muttered.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian sold a lot of resources again, and once again collected 100 million Eternal Gold Coins, and exchanged it for a drop of Qiong Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid.

After obtaining the second drop of agar to Dao gold liquid, Ye Tian continued to refine the agar to Dao gold liquid, and his cultivation quickly improved again.

Hundreds of years to the end of the Dao era.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation broke through again, reaching the peak of the Eightfold Dao Realm.

"Breaking through to the peak of the Eightfold Dao Realm so quickly, it's too fast, it's a bit unreal!"

Ye Tian only truly realized at this moment how terrifying those top clans and top forces were.

If the Su and Qin clans really want to cultivate the Ninefold Dao Realm, they can definitely cultivate them in batches, and even go all out to cultivate the Legendary Dao Realm, it is not difficult.

Therefore, the true foundation and strength of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, he estimated that he could only understand a little bit.

In the same way, the Demon Ancient Vein of the Supreme Dao Void Demon can make many veins such as the Heavenly Blood Vein dare not offend, and its strength is unimaginably terrifying.

"My strength is nothing!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After this drop of Agar Essence Dao Gold Liquid was completely consumed, Ye Tian's cultivation had also reached the limit of the Eightfold Dao Realm.

He comprehended the rules of the Fourth Sequence of Supreme Dao, cultivated to reach the limit of the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, and was qualified to impact the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm.

So, in the next few years, he was ready to attack the Nine Folds Dao Realm all the way, and it should not be difficult to break through.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian hit the Nine Folds Dao Realm, and finally succeeded.

Before, he had failed many times, mainly because the bottleneck was too shackled, and he didn't use any auxiliaries, and it was still very difficult to break through the fourth sequence of supreme rules.

But under the impact again and again, he still forced the breakthrough and succeeded, without using too precious resources.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's breakthrough attracted the attention of many Supreme Dao Realms in the Winter Night Fortress.

Soon, many Supreme Dao Realms knew that Ye Tian had broken through to the Ninefold Dao Realm, and the news also spread.
